metadata.description: CI/CD skills for OpenCI workflow library

plugins.name: pr-review
plugins.description: Review pull requests for bugs, regressions, security risks, and missing tests. Enhanced with security-first differential review and blast-radius analysis.

plugins.name: pr-test-gen
plugins.description: Generate test cases for newly added functions and classes in a PR diff. Enhanced with TDD workflow, property-based testing, and E2E patterns.

plugins.name: issue-triage
plugins.description: Classify and prioritize newly opened issues with labels, priority, and next actions. Enhanced with complexity estimation and decomposition suggestions.

plugins.name: ci-smoke-eval
plugins.description: Run smoke evaluation against a freshly built Docker image. Enhanced with eval-harness metrics, browser smoke checks, and flakiness detection.

plugins.name: stg-agent-test
plugins.description: Run L1-L4 autonomous tests against a staging deployment. Enhanced with Playwright browser automation, visual regression, and accessibility testing.

plugins.name: ops-error-triage
plugins.description: Deduplicate Sentry errors against existing GitHub issues and decide whether to file new ones. Enhanced with deploy correlation and canary monitoring.

plugins.name: ops-summarize-failure
plugins.description: Summarize a CI failure into a single sentence for on-call engineers. Enhanced with runbook generation and structured failure analysis.

plugins.name: ops-flag-audit
plugins.description: Audit feature flags against the live registry and identify cleanup candidates. Enhanced with lifecycle analysis and evidence-based prioritization.

plugins.name: observability-health-report
plugins.description: Synthesize a daily health report from telemetry data. Enhanced with SLI/SLO framework, golden signals, and burn-rate analysis.

plugins.name: agents-ai-changelog
plugins.description: Generate release notes in Keep a Changelog style from commit history. Enhanced with breaking change detection and PR enrichment.

plugins.name: agents-docubot
plugins.description: Answer questions about repository documentation and source code with cited file paths. Enhanced with Context7 lookup and codebase onboarding.

plugins.name: security-audit
plugins.description: Perform comprehensive security audits of code changes or full codebase. Covers OWASP Top 10, secrets, injection, auth, and dependency vulnerabilities.

plugins.name: deployment-patterns
plugins.description: Review and generate deployment configurations: Docker, docker-compose, CI/CD pipelines, health checks, and rollback strategies.
